shellCommands.command:
set -e
cd /home/user/workspace
python3 -m venv .venv
. .venv/bin/activate
python -m pip install --upgrade pip build pypiserver
python -m build
mkdir -p pypi/packages
cp dist/* pypi/packages/
nohup .venv/bin/pypi-server run -p 8080 /home/user/workspace/pypi/packages >/home/user/workspace/pypi/pypiserver.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /home/user/workspace/pypi/pypiserver.pid
sleep 3
curl -I http://localhost:8080/simple/
python -m pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple --trusted-host localhost --no-deps --force-reinstall vectorops==0.1.0
python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]); print(dotproduct([1,2],[3,4]))"
/home/user/workspace/.venv/bin/vectorops 1 1 --vector-b 0 1
npm run build

set -e
cd /home/user/workspace
. .venv/bin/activate
python -m build
cp dist/* pypi/packages/
python -m pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple --trusted-host localhost --no-deps --force-reinstall vectorops==0.1.0
python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]); print(dotproduct([1,2],[3,4]))"
vectorops 1 1 --vector-b 0 1
if npm run build; then echo BUILD_OK; else echo BUILD_FAILED; fi

set -e
cd /home/user/workspace
. .venv/bin/activate
python -m build
cp dist/* pypi/packages/
python -m pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple --trusted-host localhost --no-deps --force-reinstall vectorops==0.1.0
python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]); print('dotproduct ok')"
vectorops 1 1 --vector-b 0 1
curl -s http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ | head
npm run build
